releaseNotes:
Runtime streaming and tool UX protocol release.

Highlights:
- Agent event stream now batches database writes during runs and emits runtime metrics for event count, DB write time, elapsed time, first-token timing, and streaming throughput
- Send/resume no longer rely on a final chat reload; live streamed messages are promoted to persisted messages in place
- Tool protocol now carries user-facing names, activity descriptions, render hints, truncation flags, interrupt behavior, and argument equivalence helpers
- Live agent activity renders tool-specific previews for terminal, file, Git, network, and MCP operations

Fixes:
- Reduced end-of-run UI flicker caused by reloading the full chat after streaming
- Added regression coverage for event stream batching and tool UX rendering
